items.briefing:
Australia and the broader Asia Pacific region are currently the top targets for financially motivated cyberattacks, so all staff should remain alert. A new industry report also highlights that attackers are increasingly exploiting software vulnerabilities rather than tricking people through phishing — meaning keeping your devices and applications updated is more important than ever. Separately, a serious flaw in the Linux operating system has been identified that could allow attackers to gain full control of affected systems.

On a community note, deepfake technology has been used to generate fake explicit images of high school students overseas — a reminder to talk to young people about this growing threat. **Practical tip:** Always apply software and system updates promptly; many current attacks succeed simply because patches haven't been installed.

featured.title: Asia Pacific tops financial cyberattack target list
featured.quote: Asia Pacific financial sector faces escalating cyberattacks targeting banks and fintech companies.
